# omada_ip_groups (Data Source)

Lists all IP/Port groups on the Omada Controller for the given site. Requires a gateway device adopted into the site.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `site_id` (String) The ID of the site to query.

### Read-Only

- `ip_groups` (Attributes List) List of IP/Port groups. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ip_groups))

<a id="nestedatt--ip_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ip_groups`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The IP group ID.
- `ip_list` (Attributes List) List of IP address and port combinations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ip_groups--ip_list))
- `name` (String) The IP group name.
- `type` (Number) The group type (1=IP/Port group).

<a id="nestedatt--ip_groups--ip_list"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ip_groups.ip_list`

Read-Only:

- `ip` (String) IP address or CIDR subnet.
- `port_list` (List of String) Port numbers or ranges.
